option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Copy to .env.local and adjust for your environment.
# Backend API host (must include protocol, no trailing slash is preferred) NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_HOST=http://localhost:5272

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Copy to .env.local and adjust for your environment.
# Backend API host (must include protocol, no trailing slash is preferred) NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_HOST=http://localhost:5272

option.name: updatedContent
